hero.eyebrow: Local surf coaching in West Lombok
hero.title: Surf lessons in <1>Senggigi</1>
hero.subtitle: Learn with Yus, a local instructor who keeps every session safe, relaxed, and matched to your level.
hero.altImage: Aerial view of Lombok beach with perfect waves for surfing

surfSection.title: <1>Surf</1> Lessons
surfSection.intro: One focused surf lesson format, adapted to your level and the waves of the day.
surfSection.beginnerDesc: Learn the basics of surfing in a safe and fun environment. Ideal for your first gliding sensations.
surfSection.intermediateDesc: Perfect your technique, learn to read waves, and maneuver on the board.
surfSection.advancedDesc: For experienced surfers looking to improve their style, maneuvers, and explore the best spots.
surfSection.lessonTitle: A practical session built around your level
surfSection.lessonIntro: Yus keeps the lesson simple and personal: choose the right board, warm up on the beach, practice the key movements, then get direct coaching in the water.
surfSection.waveChoiceDesc: The session follows the tide, swell, and your confidence.
surfSection.coachingDesc: Small groups mean useful feedback after every wave.
surfSection.sessionDesc: Enough time to learn, repeat, and leave with clear next steps.
surfSection.mediaDesc: Photos and video from recent surf sessions in Lombok.
surfSection.instructorsDesc: Our instructors are passionate and experienced to ensure quality learning.
surfSection.smallGroupsDesc: We favor small group lessons for personalized attention and rapid progress.
surfSection.qualityEquipmentDesc: We provide boards suited to your level and wetsuits for your comfort.
surfSection.altBeginnerCourse: Surf instructor helping a beginner on a Lombok beach
surfSection.altIntermediateCourse: Intermediate surfer catching a wave in Lombok
surfSection.altAdvancedCourse: Advanced surfer performing a maneuver on a wave in Lombok
surfSection.altInstructorGroup: Surf instructor teaching a group on Lombok beach
surfSection.altActionCourse: Surfer riding a wave during an Izzy Surf School lesson

aboutSection.title: Meet <1>Yus</1>
aboutSection.intro: Izzy Surf School is built around local knowledge, patient coaching, and the kind of lesson that makes beginners feel comfortable in the water.
aboutSection.ourStoryTitle: Local coaching, simple sessions, real progress
aboutSection.ourStoryP1: Yus grew up around the beaches of Senggigi and knows how the local breaks change with tide, swell, and season.
aboutSection.ourStoryP2: The lesson is not rushed: you get the right board, a clear beach briefing, and direct feedback in the water.
aboutSection.ourStoryP3: The goal is simple: help you catch waves, understand what to improve, and leave the beach with more confidence than when you arrived.
aboutSection.idealLocationDesc: Located on the most beautiful beaches, direct access to the best spots.
aboutSection.passionateTeamDesc: Local instructors, experts, and dedicated to your enjoyment.
aboutSection.authenticExperienceDesc: Immersion in local culture and respect for the environment.
aboutSection.lombokDescription: Senggigi has accessible beach breaks, warm water, and a calmer pace than the busiest surf towns. It is a good place to learn without pressure.
aboutSection.lombokFeature2: Consistent surf spots suited to progression
aboutSection.lombokFeature3: Warm water and relaxed beach atmosphere
aboutSection.lombokFeature4: Local instructor who knows the break
aboutSection.lombokFeature5: Less crowded than many Bali beginner spots
aboutSection.lombokFeature6: Easy to combine with a day around Senggigi
aboutSection.altTeam: The Izzy Surf School team on the beach with surfboards
aboutSection.altLombokView: Panoramic view of Lombok island with its white sandy beaches and green mountains

pricingSection.title: Simple <1>Price</1>
pricingSection.intro: One clear lesson price. Message us for availability, group size, and the best time for the tide.
pricingSection.surfCourseDesc: Private or small-group surf lesson adapted to your level.
pricingSection.groupOfferDesc: We offer special rates for groups, families, and custom stays. Contact us for a tailor-made quote!

testimonialsSection.title: What Our <1>Clients Say</1>
testimonialsSection.intro: Real feedback from surfers who learned with Yus in Senggigi.
testimonialsSection.reviewSummary: Guests consistently mention patient coaching, safety, local knowledge, and a relaxed learning atmosphere.
testimonialsSection.sophieQuote: An incredible experience! The instructors were super patient and helped me catch my first waves. Lombok is beautiful!
testimonialsSection.thomasQuote: A great surf lesson with clear coaching and a relaxed local team. I highly recommend it.
testimonialsSection.emmaQuote: I loved my advanced surf lesson. The spots were perfect and the instructor's advice really helped me progress. Thanks Lombok Surf!
testimonialsSection.hiroshiQuote: Very good organization for the surf lesson. The equipment was good quality and the instructor knew the waves very well.
testimonialsSection.averageRatingInfo: Our customers love us on Google and TripAdvisor!
testimonialsSection.altSophie: Portrait of Sophie Martin, satisfied customer
testimonialsSection.altThomas: Portrait of Thomas Weber, satisfied customer
testimonialsSection.altEmma: Portrait of Emma Johnson, satisfied customer
testimonialsSection.altHiroshi: Portrait of Hiroshi Tanaka, satisfied customer

contactSection.title: Book your <1>surf lesson</1>
contactSection.intro: Send a quick WhatsApp message with your date, level, and number of people. Yus will confirm the best time around the tide.
contactSection.whatsappDesc: Ask about availability, waves, transport, or what to bring. You will get a direct answer instead of an automated form.
contactSection.addressValue: Mangsit, Senggigi, Kec. Batu Layar, Kabupaten Lombok Barat, Nusa Tenggara Bar., Indonesia
contactSection.mapCardDesc: Lessons usually start around Senggigi or nearby beginner-friendly waves. Yus confirms the exact meeting point after checking the tide and conditions.
